title: 32-bit build error
body:
```
make results.xml
make[1]: Entering directory '/home/divya/fbox-verif/mk_divider_dp_instance'
mkdir -p sim_build
verilator -cc --exe -Mdir sim_build -DCOCOTB_SIM=1 --top-module mk_divider_dp_instance --vpi --public-flat-rw --prefix Vtop -o mk_divider_dp_instance -LDFLAGS "-Wl,-rpath,/home/divya/cocotb/cocotb/libs -L/home/divya/cocotb/cocotb/libs -lcocotbvpi_verilator -lgpi -lcocotb -lgpilog -lcocotbutils"  /home/divya/fbox-verif/mk_divider_dp_instance/mk_divider_dp_instance/mk_divider_dp_instance.v /home/divya/cocotb/cocotb/share/lib/verilator/verilator.cpp
CPPFLAGS="-DVL_TIME_PRECISION_STR=1ps -std=c++11" make -C sim_build -f Vtop.mk
make[2]: Entering directory '/home/divya/fbox-verif/mk_divider_dp_instance/sim_build'
g++  -DVL_TIME_PRECISION_STR=1ps -std=c++11 -I.  -MMD -I/usr/local/share/verilator/include -I/usr/local/share/verilator/include/vltstd -DVM_COVERAGE=0 -DVM_SC=0 -DVM_TRACE=0 -Wno-sign-compare -Wno-uninitialized -Wno-unused-but-set-variable -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable -Wno-shadow      -Os -c -o verilator.o /home/divya/cocotb/cocotb/share/lib/verilator/verilator.cpp
g++  -DVL_TIME_PRECISION_STR=1ps -std=c++11 -I.  -MMD -I/usr/local/share/verilator/include -I/usr/local/share/verilator/include/vltstd -DVM_COVERAGE=0 -DVM_SC=0 -DVM_TRACE=0 -Wno-sign-compare -Wno-uninitialized -Wno-unused-but-set-variable -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable -Wno-shadow      -Os -c -o verilated.o /usr/local/share/verilator/include/verilated.cpp
In file included from /usr/local/share/verilator/include/verilated.cpp:25:0:
/usr/local/share/verilator/include/verilated_imp.h: In static member function ‘static IData VerilatedImp::fdNew(const char*, const char*)’:
/usr/local/share/verilator/include/verilated_imp.h:490:78: error: no matching function for call to ‘max(long unsigned int, std::vector<_IO_FILE*>::size_type)’
             const size_t start = std::max(31ul + 1ul + 3ul, s_s.m_fdps.size());
                                                                              ^
In file included from /usr/include/c++/5/deque:60:0,

                 from /usr/local/share/verilator/include/verilated_imp.h:29,
                 from /usr/local/share/verilator/include/verilated.cpp:25:
/usr/include/c++/5/bits/stl_algobase.h:219:5: note: candidate: template<class _Tp> const _Tp& std::max(const _Tp&, const _Tp&)
     max(const _Tp& __a, const _Tp& __b)
     ^
/usr/include/c++/5/bits/stl_algobase.h:219:5: note:   template argument deduction/substitution failed:
In file included from /usr/local/share/verilator/include/verilated.cpp:25:0:
/usr/local/share/verilator/include/verilated_imp.h:490:78: note:   deduced conflicting types for parameter ‘const _Tp’ (‘long unsigned int’ and ‘std::vector<_IO_FILE*>::size_type {aka unsigned int}’)
             const size_t start = std::max(31ul + 1ul + 3ul, s_s.m_fdps.size());
                                                                              ^
In file included from /usr/include/c++/5/deque:60:0,
                 from /usr/local/share/verilator/include/verilated_heavy.h:29,
                 from /usr/local/share/verilator/include/verilated_imp.h:29,
                 from /usr/local/share/verilator/include/verilated.cpp:25:
/usr/include/c++/5/bits/stl_algobase.h:265:5: note: candidate: template<class _Tp, class _Compare> const _Tp& std::max(const _Tp&, const _Tp&, _Compare)
     max(const _Tp& __a, const _Tp& __b, _Compare __comp)
     ^
/usr/include/c++/5/bits/stl_algobase.h:265:5: note:   template argument deduction/substitution failed:
In file included from /usr/local/share/verilator/include/verilated.cpp:25:0:
/usr/local/share/verilator/include/verilated_imp.h:490:78: note:   deduced conflicting types for parameter ‘const _Tp’ (‘long unsigned int’ and ‘std::vector<_IO_FILE*>::size_type {aka unsigned int}’)
             const size_t start = std::max(31ul + 1ul + 3ul, s_s.m_fdps.size());
                                                                              ^
```
